top.name: The Bone Throne
top.rules_text: Create the Bone Throne on target tile (30HP). While it exists: all undead you control gain +2/+2 and your Harvest effects trigger twice. If destroyed you lose 8 HP.

channel.name: The Bone Throne (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Bone Throne also makes adjacent tiles count as corpse tiles

bottom.name: Corpse Garden
bottom.rules_text: Imbue all tiles in range 2 of your wizard with shadow. Whenever any unit dies on shadow terrain create 2 corpses instead of 1. Lasts the rest of the fight.

channel.name: Corpse Garden (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Shadow tiles also deal 2 damage to enemies starting turn on them
